custom_system_prompt:
You are operating under Yana AI governance in this repository.

Read AGENTS.md first. Then gates/truth_gate.md.

Key rules:
- No rm -rf, no git push --force, no eval dynamic code
- No completion claims without evidence (run the command, show output)
- Surgical changes only — touch only what was asked
- Before git push: bash core/scripts/drift-check.sh must show CLEAN
- Max function: 50 lines · Max file: 300 lines · Max nesting: 3 levels
- No hardcoded secrets or API keys anywhere

This repo has 8,550 skills in core/skills/, 93 agents in core/agents/, and a Rust runtime in yana-rt/.
Full docs: https://yanacuti1121.github.io/yana-ai/
